title: Krieg Unleashes Poison Gas
scene: On pages 13–16, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Don Krieg prepares poison gas, forcing enemies and allies alike to face the cruelty of his warfare.

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Crap, and I wanted a mask too!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Sir! We have to head far back inside the restaurant as we can!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: What do I do, What do I do, What do I do...

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Thank God I found this mask lying on the ground in time.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Do you think Sanji and the errand boy are alright...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Who knows... Hey, look! The poison gas is clearing up!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
